risk_note.tr: RAM yukseltme donanim islemidir; Microsoft fiziksel kurulum belgesi tutmaz. Bu rehberin Microsoft kismi sadece (a) mevcut RAM'i ogrenme, (b) Win11 minimum sartlari (4 GB). Vendor (Crucial, Kingston, ureticinin kendi sayfasi) modul uyumlulugu icin tek dogru kaynaktir.
risk_note.en: RAM upgrade is hardware work; Microsoft does not publish physical install docs. Microsoft portion here covers only (a) checking current RAM, (b) Win11 minimum (4 GB). Vendor (Crucial, Kingston, manufacturer's own page) is the authoritative source for module compatibility.

body.tr: Microsoft Learn 'Windows 11 requirements': '4 gigabytes (GB) or greater'. Yukseltme onerisi Microsoft tarafindan yapilmaz - bu kullanim ihtiyacina baglidir (8/16/32 GB kullanima gore).
body.en: Microsoft Learn 'Windows 11 requirements': '4 gigabytes (GB) or greater'. Microsoft does not recommend an upgrade target - it depends on use case (8/16/32 GB based on workload).

title.tr: Mevcut RAM bilgisini Microsoft yontemi ile gor
title.en: Check current RAM via Microsoft method

body.tr: Task Manager > Performance > Memory: kapasite, hiz (MHz), form factor (DIMM/SODIMM), kullanilan slot sayisi gorulur. msinfo32 > System Summary: anakart modeli (System Model). Bu iki bilgi ureticinin uyumluluk listesinde aranir.
body.en: Task Manager > Performance > Memory: capacity, speed (MHz), form factor (DIMM/SODIMM), slots used. msinfo32 > System Summary: motherboard model (System Model). Both used to look up vendor compatibility list.

title.tr: PowerShell ile detayli RAM modul bilgisi
title.en: Detailed RAM module info via PowerShell

steps.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory | Select-Object Manufacturer, PartNumber, Capacity, Speed, ConfiguredClockSpeed, FormFactor, DeviceLocator

body.tr: Crucial.com 'Memory Advisor' ve Kingston.com 'Configurator' anakart modelinizi girip uyumlu modulleri listeleyen ucretsiz araclardir. Anakart ureticisinin kendi 'QVL' (Qualified Vendor List) sayfasi en kesin kaynaktir.
body.en: Crucial.com 'Memory Advisor' and Kingston.com 'Configurator' are free tools - enter your motherboard model, get compatible modules. Motherboard vendor's own 'QVL' (Qualified Vendor List) page is the most authoritative source.

body.tr: 1) Bilgisayari kapat, gucu cek, kalan elektrigi bosaltmak icin power dugmesine bas. 2) Antistatik onlem: metal kasa yuzeyine dokun veya antistatik bileklik kullan. 3) DIMM slot klipslerini ac, modulu ce kelimei sesi gelene kadar bastir. Cift kanal icin ayni renkteki 2. slot. 4) Kapat, ac. BIOS POST yeni toplam RAM gosterir.
body.en: 1) Power off, unplug, press power button to drain residual. 2) Anti-static: touch metal chassis or wear strap. 3) Release DIMM slot clips, press module until clips snap. For dual-channel, use 2nd slot of same color. 4) Close, power on. BIOS POST shows new total.

body.tr: Windows Memory Diagnostic (Microsoft yerlesik): Win+R > mdsched.exe > 'Restart now and check for problems'. Daha kapsamli: MemTest86 (memtest86.com) - 4+ pas onerilir. Hata varsa modul defekt veya uyumsuz.
body.en: Windows Memory Diagnostic (Microsoft built-in): Win+R > mdsched.exe > 'Restart now and check for problems'. More thorough: MemTest86 (memtest86.com) - 4+ passes recommended. Errors mean defective or incompatible module.
